creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
Apologies, forgot this patch for the ports-revision:

--- Makefile.orig       Tue Aug 14 21:45:59 2001
+++ Makefile    Tue Aug 14 21:26:27 2001
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=      itk
 PORTVERSION=   ${MAJOR}.${MINOR}
+PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    x11-toolkits tk83
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=incrtcl


--
